welcomeText: You haven’t connected any broker accounts yet. Link your first trading account to start gaining daily rebates on every trade you make.
rebatesText: Monitor your rebate earnings and cash flow summary.
requestRebateEstimateText: Submit a request to our operations team. We'll securely retrieve your latest trading data from your broker and update your dashboard.
automaticPayoutAlertText: You can only request for {nonDirect}. Direct brokers (like IC Markets, Lite Finance & etc.) send rebate directly to your trading account automatically.
